title: Better 3D Craft
description: Enhance your gaming experience with the Better 3D Craft texture that adds over 70 new 3D models of blocks and items to your game.
body:
![Better 3D Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1781d08952ea75e1811d1f8e0157d8061ca408a7.png)

### **OPTFINE RECOMMENDED**

Enhance your gaming experience with the Better 3D Craft texture that adds over 70 new 3D models of blocks and items to your game.

We have the following blocks as an example:

-Crafting Table

-Furnace

-Pumpkin

-Bookshelf

-Ores and etc...

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
## [Livepix](https://livepix.gg/heycronus)
